title: Scuftclient
description: scuftclient is my personal modpack for Minecraft 1.21.5, built for performance, clean visuals, and better PvP. It includes everything I use to make the game smoother, faster, and more fun.
body:
🎮 ScuftClient – The Ultimate Minecraft Setup 🧱🔥
Welcome to ScuftClient, a custom-crafted modpack built entirely around how I play Minecraft! 🧑‍💻 Whether you're grinding survival, dominating PvP, building like a creative god, or just hanging with friends — this pack has everything you need to elevate your 1.21.5 experience. 🚀

🌟 What's in the Pack?
🔧 Performance Boosters – Supercharge your FPS with mods like:

🧊 Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore for silky smooth gameplay

⚡️ Sodium Extra & ImmediatelyFast for that extra performance edge

🌙 Dynamic FPS to chill your system when you're tabbed out

🎨 Visual Enhancements – Minecraft, but way prettier:

✨ Complementary Shaders, Prismarine, BSL, Ebin & more for incredible lighting

🌈 Faithful 32x, Fresh Animations, Better Grassify, and Glowing Ores for clean textures

🌫️ Clear Water, Lower Grass, and resource pack tweaks for immersive realism

📦 PvP & UI Tweaks – Perfect for combat-focused players:

🛡️ Low Fire, Low Shield, BetterThirdPerson, Sharpless PvP

💬 BetterPingDisplay, NoChatReports, and Reeses Sodium Options for a cleaner UI

🗡️ Enchant Icons, Totem Tweaks, Totem Counter, and Armorchroma to stay sharp mid-fight

🎮 Quality of Life Mods – Makes the game just feel better:

📜 FullBright, MiniHud, Appleskin, Clumps, InvMove

📦 Shulker Tooltip, Camera Tweaks, Controlify, Mouse Tweaks

🗺️ Xaero's Minimap + World Map – never get lost again!

🎭 Customization & Aesthetics – Make Minecraft your own:

🎭 FancyMenu, Main Menu Credits, Drippy Loading Screen

🎧 Voice Chat (Simple Voice Chat) – talk with friends in-game!

🎒 ResourcefulConfig, Mod Menu Helper, Resourcify – manage it all effortlessly

👕 Capes, Wavey Capes, UniqueDark GUI, Clean Wool, Small Items+

🛠️ Building Tools & Creator Essentials – For creative mode and redstone experts:

📐 Litematica, WorldEdit, BetterF3, Malilib, Tweakeroo

🧱 Chams Redstone Optimized, BigShot, Better Advancements

🔊 Sound & Ambience – Enhanced audio and music:

🎵 Melody, Polytone, Gamma Utils, Flashback, Lighty

🌦️ Clear Weather tweaks and ambient shaders to set the vibe

💬 Why This Pack?
This isn't just a modpack — it's my personal toolkit 🧰. Every mod here is handpicked based on performance, visuals, PvP practicality, and overall quality-of-life. I’ve crafted it to feel modern, smooth, and fully featured without going overboard. Think of it as vanilla-plus with style — optimized for players who love a clean, responsive experience. 🎯

Whether you're speedrunning, building, or just chilling with shaders on max — ScuftClient has you covered. 🕹️

🔧 Tech Specs & Requirements
🟢 Built for Minecraft 1.21.5
📁 Works best with Fabric Loader
🧠 Includes mod menus, config libraries, and is resource pack–friendly

💻 Plug & Play. No bloat. Just pure gameplay.
Start up, load in, and enjoy Minecraft the way I do. 🧡

attribution requirements from:
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [https://skinmc.net/totem](https://skinmc.net/totem)
